layout_and_spacing.grid: Asymmetrical bento grid (mode A) for main dashboard. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
layout_and_spacing.fluid_sectioning: Use SVG paths, clip-paths, or organic CSS border-radius blobs (e.g., border-radius: 40% 60% 70% 30% / 40% 50% 60% 50%) to separate sections instead of straight lines. 60% of viewport MUST be covered by a massive blurred Cyber Yellow blob (#FDE047) fixed in the background behind the glassmorphism layout.

surfaces.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl. Internal padding must be p-8 to prevent text collision with the massive rounded-[32px] corners. Never use solid gray backgrounds.
surfaces.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary: bg-[#FDE047] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold hover:bg-[#FDE047]/90 hover:scale-105 transition-transform. Secondary: glassmorphic pill bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white.
surfaces.inputs: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-6 h-12 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FDE047] focus:border-transparent outline-none.

motion.entrance: Fluid entrance animations with elastic ease. Use Framer Motion: { type: 'spring', bounce: 0.5, duration: 0.8, damping: 15 }.
motion.hover: Hover states must lift (-translate-y-1) and slightly increase border opacity (border-white/20).

images.description: Abstract 3D liquid fluid wave in deep onyx black and vibrant cyber yellow. Place this fixed in the background behind the glassmorphic dashboard to act as the massive 60% viewport yellow shout color.
User profile avatar for the dashboard top nav.

components.charts: Use Recharts. Use #FDE047 as the primary fill/stroke for lines and bars, against the glassmorphic backgrounds. No grid lines or very faint white/5 grid lines. Tooltips must be rounded-[24px] glassmorphic bubbles.
components.ai_insights: A dedicated massive rounded-[32px] glass card, potentially with a slow-moving animated yellow gradient border to highlight the 'AI' aspect. Use a subtle glowing drop-shadow.
components.currency: Always use INR (₹) formatting: `new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(value)`.
components.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Icon weight should be bold or duotone to match the massive minimalist typography.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install General Sans via fontshare or custom CSS in index.css: `@import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=general-sans@200,300,400,500,600,700,1&display=swap');`.

DO NOT use straight lines for layout dividers. Inject absolute positioned SVGs with organic curves, or use massive blurred CSS radial-gradients (60vw by 60vh) in Cyber Yellow (#FDE047) behind the `backdrop-blur-3xl` dashboard wrapper to satisfy the '60% viewport yellow' rule.
Wrap all major dashboard panels in framer-motion `<motion.div>` with spring physics for the elastic ease effect.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="add-expense-btn"`).
Forms must use custom pill-shaped inputs. Do not use default sharp Shadcn inputs; heavily customize them to `rounded-full`.
There is no authentication needed, so mock the user profile with the provided avatar image.
